transcription: Ni digrii  kati ya 10-20 nje kwa hio nilidhani ni hali ya hewa.Ijumaa nilipoamka mdomo  wangu wa juu ulikuwa umeganda na midomo yote ilikuwa imevimba
translation: It s 10-20 degrees outside so just thought it was from the weather.  Friday when I woke up my upper lip felt numb and both are noticeably swollen.
reference: It s 10-20 degrees outside so just thought it was from the weather.  Friday when I woke up my upper lip felt numb and both are noticeably swollen.
hypothesis: Yesterday, on the 10th of June, I thought it was good weather. But when I woke up on Friday, the sky was gray and my nose was runny.

transcription: Labake alisikia sauti ya mnong'onezo ikitoka kwa ofisi ya Alamu iliyo na kiyoyozi na damu ikamiminika ndani ya mishipa yake.
translation: Labake heard some muffled-tone whisperings coming from Alamu’s air-conditioned office and blood gushed inside her veins.
reference: Labake heard some muffled-tone whisperings coming from Alamu’s air-conditioned office and blood gushed inside her veins.
hypothesis: Suddenly I heard the sound of a groan coming from the office with the window, and blood began to flow inside my veins.

transcription: Habari, matokeo yangu ya uchunguzi wa shahawa. Je, unaweza kunisaidia kuelewa matokeo yafuatayo ya uchunguzi wa shahawa yangu, na je, ni ya kawaida?
translation: Hi , My semen test result Could you help out the below mentioned of my Semen Test result and is it normal result ?
reference: Hi , My semen test result Could you help out the below mentioned of my Semen Test result and is it normal result ?
hypothesis: How are the results of my Shawa investigation? Can you help me understand the following results of my Shawa investigation and what is normal?
